executives.name: John Hennessy
executives.background: John L. Hennessy has served as the Chair of the Board of Alphabet since 2018 and as a director since 2004. He was the President of Stanford University from 2000 to 2016.

executives.name: Robin Washington
executives.background: Former EVP and CFO of Gilead Sciences, Inc. She has served as a Director since 2013.

board_of_directors.background: Former EVP and CFO of Gilead Sciences, Inc. She has served as a Director since 2013.
